MHS Arcade
  • Barcode Scanner [Deprecated]
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Hardware Requirements

  • Raspberry Pi 3 or 4

  • USB Barcode Scanner

  • SD Card (16GB or larger)

  • Network connectivity for optional logging

Software Requirements

  • Raspberry Pi OS (64-bit recommended)

  • Python 3.9+

  • Python packages: - json - datetime - re

Installation Steps

  1. Flash Raspberry Pi OS onto SD card.

  2. Connect the barcode scanner to USB.

  3. Clone the barcode system repository: .. code-block:: bash

    git clone <repo_url> ~/barcode_system

  4. Install Python dependencies: .. code-block:: bash

    pip install -r ~/barcode_system/requirements.txt

  5. Ensure the main script is executable: .. code-block:: bash

    chmod +x ~/barcode_system/barcode_scanner.py
